name: agent402-openai-tools
description: Drop-in OpenAI function-calling tools for Agent402: turn 1,000+ pay-per-call web tools into OpenAI tool definitions, with auto-payment (proof-of-work free, USDC via x402 paid). Works with chat.completions, Assistants v2, and the Responses API. Zero deps.
author: Mikey Petrillo (https://github.com/MikeyPetrillo)
